title: Thing
content:
{{CharHub|Thing|Ben Grimm}} {{AltUniverse|[[Earth-828]]|3=Characters}} {{Stub}} {{Character |image = Thing Infobox.png |real name = Benjamin J{{Conjecture|acob}} Grimm{{Ref|TFFFS}} |alias = {{Alias |primary = Ben Grimm{{Ref|FFFS}} |codenames = Thing{{Ref|FFFS}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOB = |title = |affiliation = [[United States Armed Forces/Earth-828|United States Air Force]]

{{Affiliation|FF}}
{{Affiliation|FUFO}} |movie = ''[[The Fantastic Four: First Steps]]''
''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased)
''[[Avengers: Secret Wars]]'' (unreleased)[https://x.com/DiscussingFilm/status/1817378767787975016 DiscussingFilm on X - July 27, 2024] |web series = ''[[Future Foundation Public Archives/Promotional Campaign|Future Foundation Public Archives]]'' |comic = ''[[Fantastic Four: First Steps]]''
''[[Fantastic Four: First Foes]]'' (unreleased)[https://thedirect.com/article/mcu-fantastic-four-movie-first-foes-prequel-comic Marvel Unveils Prequel to MCU Fantastic Four Movie, Announces 'First Foes' Comic (Exclusive)] |actor = [[Ebon Moss-Bachrach]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|It's clobberin' time!|Thing|The Fantastic Four: First Steps}} '''Benjamin J{{Conjecture|acob}} "Ben" Grimm''' is an astronaut whose skin was mutated to become a rock-like being publicly known as the '''Thing''', who is also a founding member of the [[Fantastic Four]]. When they were warned by [[Silver Surfer]] that [[Galactus]] sought to consume [[Earth]], Grimm and the team attempted to negotiate with him, only to fail, as Galactus wanted to make [[Franklin Richards]], the son of fellow teammates [[Mister Fantastic|Reed Richards]] and [[Invisible Woman|Sue Storm]], his successor. Back on Earth, when the team's attempt to teleport Earth away from Galactus was [[Destruction of the Teleportation Bridges|thwarted]] by Silver Surfer, Grimm and the team participated in the [[Battle of New York/Earth-828|Battle of New York]], successfully using the last [[Teleportation Bridge]] to banish the devourer, although Sue sacrificed herself to save the world. She was eventually resurrected by Franklin and Grimm celebrated their victory with his team. ==Biography== {{MD|Benjamin Grimm (Earth-828)}} ===Early Life=== ====Becoming a Pilot==== {{Rewrite}} Ben Grimm was born on Yancy Street, [[New York City]]. Sometime during his college days, he befriended fellow student [[Reed Richards]], who eventually became his lifelong best friend. Grimm later joined the [[United States Armed Forces/Earth-828|United States Air Force]] as a test pilot, where his abilities on field proved to be so remarkable that even Richards himself proudly describes Ben as "the best pilot in the world."{{Ref|FFFS}}{{Ref|TFFFS}} ===Founding the Fantastic Four=== ====Gaining Abilities==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====Isolation==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====[[Revolt of Subterranea]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====Expecting a New Member==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====Meeting Rachel Rozman==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ===[[Advent of Galactus]]=== ====Encountering Silver Surfer==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====Preparing for Launch==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====[[Destruction of LHS-275|Visiting LHS-275]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====[[Chase of the Fantastic Four|Escape from Silver Surfer]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====Breakers of Bad News==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ====[[Battle of New York/Earth-828|Battle of New York]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ===Continuing to Change=== ====New Adventure==== ''To be added''{{Ref|TFFFS}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Before [[Fantastic Four|we]] went up the first time, you couldn't turn invisible, Ben wasn't a rock, and [[Johnny Storm|Johnny]] never caught fire.|[[Reed Richards]] to [[Sue Storm]]|The Fantastic Four: First Steps - Deleted Scene}} *'''Artificially Enhanced Physiology''': While on a mission to space, Grimm was subjected to [[Cosmic Radiation]], causing his DNA to be altered, mixing his body with a nearby set of orange rocks. **'''Stone Mimicry''': Grimm was transformed into a burly creature with an orange rock-like hide that is seemingly nearly indestructible. ***'''Superhuman Strength''': Thing possesses colossal levels of superhuman strength. He can effortlessly lift vehicles, and has pulled a massive cargo ship using sheer brute force. ***'''Superhuman Durability''': Due to his rock-like skin, Thing is durable to most impacts and attacks. He was able to ram through pillars without any injuries. ***'''Superhuman Stamina''': Due to his new rock-like body, Thing is able to remain exerting himself physically for extended periods of time without suffering exhaustion. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|The best pilot in the [[Earth|world]], right here."
"Yeah. Best looking, he means.|[[Reed Richards]] and Ben Grimm|The Fantastic Four: First Steps}} *'''Master Pilot''': ''To be added'' *'''Master Combatant:''' ''To be added'' ==Equipment== *'''[[Fantastic Four Uniforms|Fantastic Four Uniform]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Digi-Calc]]''': ''To be added'' ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Excelsior]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Fantasticar]]''': ''To be added'' ==Facilities== *'''[[Baxter Building]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Daniel Grimm]] † - Father *[[Petunia Grimm]] - Aunt ===Allies=== *[[Fantastic Four]] - Teammates and Friends **[[Mister Fantastic|Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic]] - Leader and Best Friend **[[Invisible Woman|Sue Storm/Invisible Woman]] - Close Friend **[[Human Torch|Johnny Storm/Human Torch]] - Best Friend *[[United States Armed Forces/Earth-828|United States Air Force]] *[[American National Space Agency]] *[[Future Foundation]] **[[Lynne Nichols]] *[[K.E.R.B.I.E.]] † - Accidental Victim *[[H.E.R.B.I.E.]] - Friend *[[Franklin Richards]] *[[Mole Man|Harvey Elder/Mole Man]] - Former Enemy *[[Moloids]] - Former Enemies *[[John F. Kennedy/Earth-828|John F. Kennedy]] *[[Jackie Kennedy]] *''[[The Ted Gilbert Show]]'' **[[Ted Gilbert]] - Interviewer **[[Sally (Makeup Artist)|Sally]] *[[Rachel Rozman]] - Love Interest *[[New York City Police Thinker|Julius/Mad Thinker]] *[[Diablo|Esteban Corazón de Pablo/Diablo]] *[[Puppet Master|Phillip Masters/Puppet Master]] *[[Wizard|Bentley Wittman/Wizard]] *[[Red Ghost|Ivan Kragoff/Red Ghost]] *[[Super-Apes]] **[[Peotor]] *[[Galactus|Galan/Galactus]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|TFFFS}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|FFFS}} **{{Appearance|TFFFS}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|FFFF}} (unreleased) *{{Appearance|TFFFS}} **{{Appearance|FFPA}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|AD}} (unreleased) *{{Appearance|ASW}} (unreleased) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Ben Grimm is an astronaut and best friend of [[Mister Fantastic]] who was subjected to [[cosmic radiation]], turning him into a rock-like monster known as the Thing. ==Behind the Scenes== *Thing in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the fourth live-action incarnation of the character, following incarnations portrayed by [[Michael Bailey Smith]] (Ben Grimm) and {{WPS|Carl Ciarfalio}} (Thing), {{WPS|Michael Chiklis}}, and {{WPS|Jamie Bell}}. *In the Latin American Spanish dubbing of the ''[[Ironheart (TV series)|Ironheart]]'' episode ''[[Bad Magic]]'', [[Ronnie Williams]] compares [[Riri Williams]]' bursting into her room by destroying her door to The Thing instead of the {{WPS|Kool-Aid Man}} as in the original English version. ==References== {{Gallery|Thing/Gallery}}
